category_sources: Official GitHub README describes RTags as a client/server application that indexes C/C++ code for references, declarations, definitions, and symbols.
source_facts.description says source code cross-referencer like ctags with a clang frontend.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading and introduction use RTags.
source_facts.homepage points to official Andersbakken/rtags repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes quickstart and project introduction.
Official GitHub README says documentation can be found in the Wiki.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Andersbakken/rtags, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes indexing C/C++/ObjC and Emacs integration.
source_facts.description mentions ctags-like cross-reference and clang frontend.
